deploys.subject: Moon Rover: add 5th rover EXPLOSIVE FARTS — speed/accel 5, handling 1, with boost x1.60 and lateral grip x0.55 for a chaos pick

Moon Rover: replace color-swatch picker with a 2x2 garage of 4 rover profiles (SPRINTER/GRIPPER/BALANCED/HOPPER) — each with speed/accel/handling/jump stat bars and runtime multipliers applied to engine, boost, turn rate, lateral grip, and jump impulse
Moon Rover: spawn meteors 60-180u in front of the player and add a glowing pulsing landing indicator (ring + disc + crosshair) that ramps brightness as impact nears
Moon Rover: widen track corridor (9→14u) + smoother Catmull-Rom curves (tension 0.4→0.55), and fix boost-time steering by bumping turn rate 1.3x and lateral grip 0.22→0.32 when boosting

Moon Rover: snap boost pads + missile pickups directly to racing curve via getPointAt/getTangentAt + add laser cannon (Z), manual nitro burst (N), gamepad mapping w/ racing wheel pedal auto-detect, and force-feedback rumble on landings/nitro/spin-out
Add Neon Purr — procedural neon cat that follows the cursor with cyan glow, slit eyes that track it, sways its tail, and runs a continuous Web Audio purr engine that swells when you stand still
Add Neon Heart — glowing SVG heart that beats faster every click, decays back to 60 BPM, with lub-dub Web Audio thumps and a calm→manic mood line
Moon Rover: align player + AI starting grid with track direction (face CP0, 2-1 grid behind player), and scatter targeted meteors via 18-44u uniform-random landing offset
Moon Rover: add track boundary pylons running parallel to a Catmull-Rom racing line + 2 shortcut chords with magenta gates, jump ramps, and a soft 'OFF · TRACK' regolith friction penalty
Moon Rover: bump engine power to 32 + matching AI speeds, and aim 80% of meteors at the player's predicted position w/ velocity-scaled jitter
Moon Rover: add falling meteors w/ permanent crater + debris terrain deformation, persistent leaderboard, larger 1400u map, reduced booster force for control + Brave compat notes
Add Moon Rover Rally — multiplayer 3D low-gravity racing on procedural lunar terrain w/ jump physics, AI rovers, boost pads, spin-out missiles, and a persistent fastest-laps leaderboard
Add Cursed Pizza Parlor — pizza customizer with wriggling worms, glowing radioactive sludge, severed thumbs, eyeballs, and a curse-index verdict from a horror-themed customer
Add Unicorn Reef — neon jellyfish + rainbow unicorn seahorses + Nemo the neon clownfish hiding in a swaying anemone coral hideout
Update lidless with vertical glowing cat-slit pupil + brow-ridge shadow + reshaped almond outline for a more predatory, hooded gaze
Add Lidless — fourth-wall-breaking sentient eye that tracks the cursor, judges your behavior, and says things like 'are you still here?' / 'stop moving it hurts' / 'is this all you do?'
Add Kinetic Arena — zero-G neon physics playground via Matter.js with explosive collisions, chaos burst, and a toggleable central black hole
Switch cursed-concept-log to dynamic import w/ try/catch so config-load failures surface visibly instead of killing the module silently
Add diagnostic instrumentation to cursed-concept-log so click failures surface in console + status bar
Fix unresponsive cursed-concept-log clicks (delegated upvotes + pointer-events on seal) + ember/candle/pentagram cursed aesthetic pass
Add Tyrell Corporation ziggurat with red neon windows, volumetric haze, and Blade Runner spinners to Neon Parkour
Add jump key remap to neon-parkour-puzzle — click button on start screen or toolbar then press any key (Backspace included for zennlogic), persisted to localStorage
Fix neon-parkour-puzzle pointer-events bug — invisible win overlay was covering viewport with pointer-events:auto, swallowing every click meant for the start button
Fix neon-parkour-puzzle start button hang — pre-bind click handler in non-module script + try/catch around Three.js init so errors surface visibly instead of leaving the title screen dead
Add Neon Parkour Puzzle — 3D rooftop parkour with safe falls, sigil puzzle, and gravity-flip zones via Three.js
Add Cursed Concept Log — grimoire-themed forbidden archive for chat's worst app ideas with submit + endorse
Add Graffiti Chaos Wall — persistent neon spray-paint wall with Supabase backend
Add TwitchCon Hug Coupons — printable holofoil hug ticket generator
Add MJ Oww Generator — 8 formant-synthesized vocal phrases over fart sub-layer
Add T-Pain's Gas Chamber — auto-tuned fart synthesizer
